folio.label: 122r
folio.l: Myn herte q¶ on , is euäemo in drede
I trowe some men of armes , ben there Inne
That shapen hem , this Citee for to wynne
It were rigút good , that al sucú thyngö were knowe
An other rouned , to his felawe lowe
And seide he lyetú , for it is rather lyk
An apparence I made , by some magyk
As iogeloures pleyen , at thise grete

note.notetxt: 211there is a cross in ink in the right margin.ODR

folio.l: Of sondry doutes , thus they Iangle & trete
As lewede peeple demen , comunely
Of thynges that ben made , more subtily
Than they can , in here lewednes comprehende
They demen gladly , to the baddere ende
¢ And some of hem wondred , on the Mirour
That born~ was vp , vn to the maister Tour
How men mygút in it , swicú thynges se
A nother answered & seide , it mygút wel be
Naturely , by composiciou~s
Of anglys , and of sligú reflexiou~s
And seiden , that in Rome , was swicú on
They spoken of Alocen , and vitulon
Of Aristotle , that wretyn in here lyues
Of queynt Miroures , and of ¹spectyues
As knowen they , that han here bokes herd
And other folk , han wondred on the swerd
That wolde percen , thurgú out euäy thyngö
And feln in speche , of Thelophus the kyngö
And of Achilles , for his queynt spere
For he coude witú it , bothe hele and dere
Rigút in swicú gise , as men moun witú the swerd
Of whicú rigút now , ©e han ©oure seluen herd
They speken of sondry hardyngö , of metal
And speken of medicynes , ther witú al
And how & wha~ne , it shulde I harded be
Whicú is vnknowe , algates vn to me
Tho speken they , of Canaces ryngö
And seiden alle , that swicú a wonder thyngö
Of craft of Rynges , herd they neuäe non
Saue that he Moyses , and kyngö Salamon
Hadden a name of konnyngö , in swicú art
Thus seitú the peeple , & drawen hem a part
But nathelees some seiden , that it was
Wonder to make , of Fern asshen , glas
And ©et is glas , nougút lyke asshen of fern
